system.benefit: Spend Fate Point on All-Out Attack to make melee attacks impossible to parry or dodge
system.description: Space Marines are amongst the deadliest warriors in the galaxy, and they have learned how best to place their blows for maximum effect. When taking the All-Out Attack action, a Space Marine may spend a Fate Point (before rolling the dice) to make his melee attacks for that round impossible to parry or dodge.
